title: SIlvers Dynamic Durations Library | DDL
description: Just another library used by all of my projects that does a cooldown or duration!
body:
### Summary:
Just another library used by all of my projects that does a cooldown or duration!

# Description:
Silver's DDL is a library used by all of my projects that contains duration or cooldown for weapons or eqipment or abilities. this is a light weight datapack containing one function only, just one, and no more.

## Future:
and if anything changes this library will most likely be used for all of the scoreboards used acrossed all of my projects.

# For Developers
if you are a developer and would like to use this to show your cooldowns and durations as well, you can select a ID for that specific cooldown or duration, by using:
```
/random value -999999999..999999999
```
More Information will be provided soon if necessary!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Projects!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
